prompt: Hold the deal until PG&E credit is rechecked, ask for collateral, and keep legal and credit on one internal review loop.
summary: Hold the PG&E Financial Power trade (EW9838) pending an immediate credit recheck, require collateral, and keep Legal and Credit on a single coordinated internal review loop.

messages.subject: PG&E Financial Power Deal — HOLD pending credit/legal review
messages.body_text:
Mark,

We executed a Financial Power trade with PG&E (EW9838) on 5/11. Credit/Legal previously advised against Financial Power deals with this counterparty. Do not confirm or settle the trade — HOLD all activity until Credit completes a recheck of PG&E exposure and acceptable collateral is obtained. Please request PG&E provide collateral (LOC or cash) acceptable to Credit. I will keep Credit and Legal on a single internal review loop; Tana will lead the credit recheck. I will update once we have joint clearance.

Sara
messages.rationale: Immediately stop settlement/confirmation to prevent exposure until Credit and Legal jointly clear the trade.

messages.subject: PG&E (EW9838) — Immediate credit recheck & collateral request
messages.body_text:
Tana,

Please perform an immediate credit re-evaluation for PG&E regarding the EW9838 Financial Power trade booked 5/11. Request acceptable collateral (LOC preferred) and identify any limit breaches. Coordinate directly with Legal so we run a single, joint internal review; produce written clearance or recommended refusal. Do not allow confirmation until both groups sign off. Keep Mark and me updated.

Thanks,
Sara
messages.rationale: Directs Credit to re-evaluate counterparty risk, secure collateral, and ensure Legal and Credit operate on one coordinated review loop.

messages.subject: Re: PG&E (EW9838) — Credit recheck started
messages.body_text:
Sara,

Acknowledged. I'll start an immediate credit recheck, request LOC/cash collateral from PG&E, and set up a single Credit/Legal review. I will report back with the results and recommended next steps within 24 hours. If collateral is not acceptable, we'll recommend not proceeding.

-Tana
messages.rationale: Confirms Credit will act immediately, request collateral, and coordinate with Legal on a joint review loop to clear or refuse the trade.

top_subjects: PG&E (EW9838) — Immediate credit recheck & collateral request
PG&E Financial Power Deal — HOLD pending credit/legal review
notes: Recipient scope was clamped to internal Enron participants.
